path.style: fill: url("#gradient-0-0"); stroke: url("#gradient-1-0"); transform-origin: 23.658px 23.577px; stroke-linejoin: bevel;
stroke-width: 1; fill: url("#gradient-0-1"); stroke: url("#gradient-1-1"); transform-origin: 23.658px 23.577px; stroke-linejoin: bevel;
